22: # Pydantic models for type Chat Message validation
23: class Context(PydanticBaseModel):
24:     compiled: str
25:     file: str
26:     uri: Optional[str] = None
27:     query: Optional[str] = None
28: 
29:     @model_validator(mode="after")
30:     def set_uri_fallback(self):
31:         """Set the URI to existing deeplink URI. Fallback to file based URI if unset."""
32:         if self.uri and self.uri.strip():
33:             self.uri = self.uri
34:         elif self.file and (self.file.startswith("http") or self.file.startswith("file://")):
35:             self.uri = self.file
36:         elif self.file:
37:             self.uri = f"file://{self.file}"
38:         else:
39:             self.uri = None
40:         return self

302:     class InputToolOptions(models.TextChoices):

310:     class OutputModeOptions(models.TextChoices):

326:     managed_by_admin = models.BooleanField(default=False)
327:     chat_model = models.ForeignKey(ChatModel, on_delete=models.CASCADE)

331:     privacy_level = models.CharField(max_length=30, choices=PrivacyLevel.choices, default=PrivacyLevel.PRIVATE)
332:     is_hidden = models.BooleanField(default=False)
333: 
334:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
335:         is_new = self._state.adding
336: 
337:         if self.creator is None:
338:             self.managed_by_admin = True
339: 
340:         if is_new and not self.slug:
341:             random_sequence = "".join(choice("0123456789") for i in range(6))
342:             slug = f"{self.name.lower().replace(' ', '-')}-{random_sequence}"
343:             self.slug = slug
344: 
345:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
346: 
347:     def __str__(self):
348:         return self.name

351: class ProcessLock(DbBaseModel):
352:     class Operation(models.TextChoices):
353:         INDEX_CONTENT = "index_content"
354:         SCHEDULED_JOB = "scheduled_job"
355:         SCHEDULE_LEADER = "schedule_leader"
356:         APPLY_MIGRATIONS = "apply_migrations"
357: 
358:     # We need to make sure that some operations are thread-safe. To do so, add locks for potentially shared operations.
359:     # For example, we need to make sure that only one process is updating the embeddings at a time.
360:     name = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=Operation.choices, unique=True)
361:     started_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
362:     max_duration_in_seconds = models.IntegerField(default=60 * 60 * 12)  # 12 hours

365: @receiver(pre_save, sender=Agent)
366: def verify_agent(sender, instance, **kwargs):
367:     # check if this is a new instance
368:     if instance._state.adding:
369:         if Agent.objects.filter(name=instance.name, privacy_level=Agent.PrivacyLevel.PUBLIC).exists():
370:             raise ValidationError(f"A public Agent with the name {instance.name} already exists.")
371:         if Agent.objects.filter(name=instance.name, creator=instance.creator).exists():
372:             raise ValidationError(f"A private Agent with the name {instance.name} already exists.")

392: class WebScraper(DbBaseModel):
393:     class WebScraperType(models.TextChoices):
394:         FIRECRAWL = "Firecrawl"
395:         OLOSTEP = "Olostep"
396:         EXA = "Exa"
397:         DIRECT = "Direct"
398: 
399:     name = models.CharField(
400:         max_length=200,
401:         default=None,
402:         null=True,
403:         blank=True,
404:         unique=True,
405:         help_text="Friendly name. If not set, it will be set to the type of the scraper.",
406:     )
407:     type = models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=WebScraperType.choices, default=WebScraperType.DIRECT)
408:     api_key = models.CharField(
409:         max_length=200,
410:         default=None,
411:         null=True,
412:         blank=True,
413:         help_text="API key of the web scraper. Only set if scraper service requires an API key. Default is set from env var.",
414:     )
415:     api_url = models.URLField(
416:         max_length=200,
417:         default=None,
418:         null=True,
419:         blank=True,
420:         help_text="API URL of the web scraper. Only set if scraper service on non-default URL.",
421:     )
422:     priority = models.IntegerField(
423:         default=None,
424:         null=True,
425:         blank=True,
426:         unique=True,
427:         help_text="Priority of the web scraper. Lower numbers run first.",
428:     )
429: 
430:     def clean(self):
431:         error = {}
432:         if self.name is None:
433:             self.name = self.type.capitalize()
434:         if self.api_url is None:
435:             if self.type == self.WebScraperType.FIRECRAWL:
436:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("FIRECRAWL_API_URL", "https://api.firecrawl.dev")
437:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.OLOSTEP:
438:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("OLOSTEP_API_URL", "https://agent.olostep.com/olostep-p2p-incomingAPI")
439:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.EXA:
440:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("EXA_API_URL", "https://api.exa.ai")
441:         if self.api_key is None:
442:             if self.type == self.WebScraperType.FIRECRAWL:
443:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("FIRECRAWL_API_KEY")
444:                 if not self.api_key and self.api_url == "https://api.firecrawl.dev":
445:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use default Firecrawl. Get API key from https://firecrawl.dev."
446:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.OLOSTEP:
447:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("OLOSTEP_API_KEY")
448:                 if self.api_key is None:
449:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use Olostep. Get API key from https://olostep.com/."
450:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.EXA:
451:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("EXA_API_KEY")
452:                 if self.api_key is None:
453:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use Exa. Get API key from https://exa.ai/."
454:         if error:
455:             raise ValidationError(error)
456: 
457:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
458:         self.clean()
459: 
460:         if self.priority is None:
461:             max_priority = WebScraper.objects.aggregate(models.Max("priority"))["priority__max"]
462:             self.priority = max_priority + 1 if max_priority else 1
463: 
464:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
465: 
466:     def __str__(self):
467:         return self.name

554:     name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="default")
555:     # Type of content the model can generate embeddings for
556:     model_type = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=ModelType.choices, default=ModelType.TEXT)
557:     # Bi-encoder model of sentence-transformer type to load from HuggingFace
558:     bi_encoder = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="thenlper/gte-small")
559:     # Config passed to the sentence-transformer model constructor. E.g. device="cuda:0", trust_remote_server=True etc.
560:     bi_encoder_model_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
561:     # Query encode configs like prompt, precision, normalize_embeddings, etc. for sentence-transformer models
562:     bi_encoder_query_encode_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
563:     # Docs encode configs like prompt, precision, normalize_embeddings, etc. for sentence-transformer models
564:     bi_encoder_docs_encode_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
565:     # Cross-encoder model of sentence-transformer type to load from HuggingFace
566:     cross_encoder = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="mixedbread-ai/mxbai-rerank-xsmall-v1")
567:     # Config passed to the cross-encoder model constructor. E.g. device="cuda:0", trust_remote_server=True etc.
568:     cross_encoder_model_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
569:     # Inference server API endpoint to use for embeddings inference. Bi-encoder model should be hosted on this server
570:     embeddings_inference_endpoint = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
571:     # Inference server API Key to use for embeddings inference. Bi-encoder model should be hosted on this server
572:     embeddings_inference_endpoint_api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
573:     # Inference server API type to use for embeddings inference.
574:     embeddings_inference_endpoint_type = models.CharField(
575:         max_length=200, choices=ApiType.choices, default=ApiType.LOCAL
576:     )
577:     # Inference server API endpoint to use for embeddings inference. Cross-encoder model should be hosted on this server
578:     cross_encoder_inference_endpoint = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
579:     # Inference server API Key to use for embeddings inference. Cross-encoder model should be hosted on this server
580:     cross_encoder_inference_endpoint_api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
581:     # The confidence threshold of the bi_encoder model to consider the embeddings as relevant
582:     bi_encoder_confidence_threshold = models.FloatField(default=0.18)
583: 
584:     def __str__(self):
585:         return self.name

588: class TextToImageModelConfig(DbBaseModel):
589:     class ModelType(models.TextChoices):
590:         OPENAI = "openai"
591:         REPLICATE = "replicate"
592:         GOOGLE = "google"
593: 
594:     model_name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="dall-e-3")
595:     friendly_name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
596:     model_type = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=ModelType.choices, default=ModelType.OPENAI)
597:     price_tier = models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=PriceTier.choices, default=PriceTier.FREE)
598:     api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
599:     ai_model_api = models.ForeignKey(AiModelApi, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
600: 
601:     def clean(self):
602:         # Custom validation logic
603:         error = {}
604:         if self.model_type == self.ModelType.OPENAI:
605:             if self.api_key and self.ai_model_api:
606:                 error["api_key"] = (
607:                     "Both API key and AI Model API cannot be set for OpenAI models. Please set only one of them."
608:                 )
609:                 error["ai_model_api"] = (
610:                     "Both API key and OpenAI config cannot be set for OpenAI models. Please set only one of them."
611:                 )
612:         if self.model_type != self.ModelType.OPENAI and self.model_type != self.ModelType.GOOGLE:
613:             if not self.api_key:
614:                 error["api_key"] = "The API key field must be set for non OpenAI, non Google models."
615:             if self.ai_model_api:
616:                 error["ai_model_api"] = "AI Model API cannot be set for non OpenAI, non Google models."
617:         if error:
618:             raise ValidationError(error)
619: 
620:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
621:         self.clean()
622:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
623: 
624:     def __str__(self):
625:         return f"{self.model_name} - {self.model_type}"

658: class Conversation(DbBaseModel):
659:     user = models.ForeignKey(KhojUser, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
660:     conversation_log = models.JSONField(default=dict)
661:     client = models.ForeignKey(ClientApplication, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
662: 
663:     # Slug is an app-generated conversation identifier. Need not be unique. Used as display title essentially.
664:     slug = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
665: 
666:     # The title field is explicitly set by the user.
667:     title = models.CharField(max_length=500, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
668:     agent = models.ForeignKey(Agent, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
669:     file_filters = models.JSONField(default=list)
670:     id = models.UUIDField(default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False, unique=True, primary_key=True, db_index=True)
671: 
672:     def clean(self):
673:         # Validate conversation_log structure
674:         try:
675:             messages = self.conversation_log.get("chat", [])
676:             for msg in messages:
677:                 ChatMessageModel.model_validate(msg)
678:         except Exception as e:
679:             raise ValidationError(f"Invalid conversation_log format: {str(e)}")
680: 
681:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
682:         self.clean()
683:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
684: 
685:     @property
686:     def messages(self) -> List[ChatMessageModel]:
687:         """Type-hinted accessor for conversation messages"""
688:         validated_messages = []
689:         for msg in self.conversation_log.get("chat", []):
690:             try:
691:                 # Clean up inferred queries if they contain None
692:                 if msg.get("intent") and msg["intent"].get("inferred_queries"):
693:                     msg["intent"]["inferred-queries"] = [
694:                         q for q in msg["intent"]["inferred_queries"] if q is not None and isinstance(q, str)
695:                     ]
696:                 msg["message"] = str(msg.get("message", ""))
697:                 validated_messages.append(ChatMessageModel.model_validate(msg))
698:             except ValidationError as e:
699:                 logger.warning(f"Skipping invalid message in conversation: {e}")
700:                 continue
701:         return validated_messages
702: 
703:     async def pop_message(self, interrupted: bool = False) -> Optional[ChatMessageModel]:
704:         """
705:         Remove and return the last message from the conversation log, persisting the change to the database.
706:         When interrupted is True, we only drop the last message if it was an interrupted message by khoj.
707:         """
708:         chat_log = self.conversation_log.get("chat", [])
709: 
710:         if not chat_log:
711:             return None
712: 
713:         last_message = chat_log[-1]
714:         is_interrupted_msg = last_message.get("by") == "khoj" and not last_message.get("message")
715:         # When handling an interruption, only pop if the last message is an empty one by khoj.
716:         if interrupted and not is_interrupted_msg:
717:             return None
718: 
719:         # Pop the last message, save the conversation, and then return the message.
720:         popped_message_dict = chat_log.pop()
721:         await self.asave()
722: 
723:         # Try to validate and return the popped message as a Pydantic model
724:         try:
725:             return ChatMessageModel.model_validate(popped_message_dict)
726:         except ValidationError as e:
727:             logger.warning(f"Popped an invalid message from conversation. The removal has been saved. Error: {e}")
728:             # The invalid message was removed and saved, but we can't return a valid model.
729:             return None
730: 
731: 
732: class PublicConversation(DbBaseModel):
733:     source_owner = models.ForeignKey(KhojUser, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
734:     conversation_log = models.JSONField(default=dict)
735:     slug = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
736:     title = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
737:     agent = models.ForeignKey(Agent, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
738: 
739: 
740: @receiver(pre_save, sender=PublicConversation)
741: def verify_public_conversation(sender, instance, **kwargs):
742:     # check if this is a new instance
743:     if instance._state.adding:
744:         base_length = 50  # Base slug length before adding random suffix
745:         base_slug = re.sub(r"\W+", "-", instance.slug.lower())[:base_length] if instance.slug else uuid.uuid4().hex
746:         suffix_length = 8  # Length of the random suffix to ensure uniqueness
747:         while True:
748:             random_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:suffix_length]
749:             slug = f"{base_slug}-{random_id}"
750:             if not PublicConversation.objects.filter(slug=slug).exists():
751:                 break
752:         instance.slug = slug
